text: Standing before this glass wall and the exhibition behind it, I am struck by the juxtaposition of openness and separation. My own reflection blends with the environment, inviting reflection on the boundaries between observer and observed. The fire extinguisher nearby is a gentle reminder of control and order in a space designed for curiosity. I feel the anticipation of exploring knowledge, but also a subtle unease at standing outside, not quite inside the realm of ideas just yet.
